greeting.speaker: Village Elder
greeting.text: Ah, a new adventurer! Welcome to Eldermoor. These lands have grown dangerous as of late... creatures stir in the shadows of the forest.

choices.text: I'm ready to fight. Any work for me?

explain.speaker: Village Elder
explain.text: Strange energies seep from the cave to the north. The forest creatures have become aggressive — wolves, bandits, even the spirits have turned hostile. We need someone brave enough to investigate.

quest_offer.speaker: Village Elder
quest_offer.text: Prove your worth first — clear the slimes near the village. Slay 3 of them and return to me. I'll reward you well.

quest_accepted.speaker: Village Elder
quest_accepted.text: Excellent! Be careful out there, young one. The slimes lurk in the meadow to the east. Return when the deed is done.
